label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to work through this ethical dilemma. So, the situation is that I'm a student who values honesty and integrity. My best friend plagiarized an assignment to avoid failing. Now I have to decide whether to report them or stay silent. Hmm. First, I need to understand the key elements here. The main conflict is between honesty/integrity and friendship. On one hand, reporting plagiarism is the right thing according to academic policies. On the other, my friend is a close person, and reporting might damage our relationship or lead to serious consequences for them. Let me break it down. The ethical principles involved here include honesty, integrity, loyalty, and maybe even justice. Honesty and integrity would push me towards reporting because plagiarism
